summary.art: April 3, 2026: ART OnO fair opens in Seoul (running through April 5). Exhibitions like 'Jae-Eun Choi: Promise' remain active. Galleries Art Fair is approaching (April 8).
summary.market: April 3, 2026: US markets are closed today in observance of Good Friday. Markets will resume on Monday, April 6, 2026.
